name: Chicken-And-Fruit Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with salt.
2. Grind the peppercorns, clove, and cinnamon together in a spice mill.
3. Mix the ground spices with sugar, sherry, garlic, vinegar, and 1 1/2 teaspoons of salt.
4. Spread one-third of the onion at the bottom of the crockpot.
5. Cover with one-third each of the tomatoes, chicken, and fruit.
6. Add bay leaves and sprinkle some of the seasoning mixture.
7. Pour on half of the vinegar-spice mixture.
8. Repeat layers, finishing with a topping of onion, tomatoes, and fruit.
9. Cover and cook for about 1 hour.
10. Uncover and cook for an additional 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and some juices have reduced.
11. Discard bay leaves.
12. For garnish, heat oil and fry plantain slices until deep golden brown. Remove and drain.
13. To serve, cover the top of the stew with capers, olives, and fried plantain.
